Headline: #85 Central Temporary Southbound Reroute near Central/Milwaukee
ShortDescription: Southbound 85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted via Central, Milwaukee, Gale, Higgins and Central: due to, street blockage near Central/Milwaukee.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted via Central, Milwaukee, Gale, Higgins and Central: due to, street blockage near Central/Milwaukee.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Reroute at 63rd/Hayes
ShortDescription: #63 63rd buses are rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 63rd/Hayes.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Eastbound #63 63rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 63rd, Stony Island, 64th, Blackstone (await recovery time), then resume their normal route on 63rd.

Westbound buses will continue Blackstone, then resume their normal route on 63rd.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near 63rd/Hayes.
